concepts.headline: Skip the gridlock. Save the planet.
concepts.subline: The lightweight, long-range electric commuter bike.
concepts.rationale: High-contrast emerald green grabs attention instantly in high-traffic SoMa, emphasizing eco-friendly premium commuting.

concepts.headline: Your new commute has zero emissions.
concepts.subline: App-unlocked, lightweight, and built to bypass city traffic.
concepts.rationale: Tech-forward, high-contrast aesthetic that appeals directly to the SoMa startup and tech crowd.
